title: Extra Select Puppy Bones Dog Treat Biscuits in a 1ltr Bucket (approx 340 biscuits)
features: Small Dog Treats: These puppy training treats are approximately 2cm, a perfect mini size for smaller mouths.
Nutrious Snacks: 8 percent protein and 7.9 percent fat ensure each dog treat contains all the puppy essentials to grow big and strong.
Dog Training Treats: Use these puppy bones to make reward-based training sessions more fun and effective.
Delicious Flavour: The vanilla flavour of these dog biscuits and snacks make them high value dog treats that young dogs love.
Flexible Feeding: These dog treats for small dogs fit easily into their regular doggy diets, great for everyday rewards.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Puppy Treats How to Feed? The Puppy Treat Bones are recommended for puppies over 3 months old. The daily feeding amounts are approximations: small dogs should have 2-4, medium dogs 4-6, and large dogs 7-9. These should be given as rewards alongside your puppy's regular meals. Always remember to adjust the portions according to your puppy's age, lifestyle, and health condition. Nutrition Protein 8.0%, Crude Fat 7.9%, Crude Ash 1.4%, Crude Fibre 0.2% Sodium 0.3% Cereals, Glucose 18.75%, Palm Oil, Minerals, Chicken Meal, Acidity-Regulator, Caramel: E-150d. Colouring Treating your dog Right Always supervise your puppy when giving them a new treat to ensure they chew safely. Introduce the bones gradually into your puppy's diet to monitor for any adverse reactions. Always consider your puppy's daily caloric needs when integrating these bones into their diet. Irresistible Vanilla Flavour These Puppy Treat Bones come in a delectable vanilla flavour that dogs absolutely love. The scent is enticing, and the taste leaves them wanting more, making it the perfect reward. Nutritionally Valuable With a balanced profile of 8.0% protein and 7.9% crude fat, these bones serve as more than just a tasty treat - they have essential nutrients, essential for your pup's wellbeing. Perfectly Sized These bones are designed with your puppy's small mouth in mind. The petite size not only makes it easier for them, but also ensures a gentler impact on their developing teeth.
